X_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = min(max(steps_per_epoch // 2, 1), max(total_steps // 10, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step: int) -> float:\\n        if step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step - warmup_steps) / float(max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + math.cos(math.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed 256-step budget more effectively with a short warmup and full-budget cosine decay, while pairing it with AdamW and a slightly larger base learning rate to improve early optimization without changing model complexity.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
